    A

    add(double[], double[]) - Static method in class ie.atu.sw.VectorUtils
    Adds two vectors element-wise.

    description() - Method in enum class ie.atu.sw.ConsoleColour
     
    divide(double[], double[]) - Static method in class ie.atu.sw.VectorUtils
    Divides vector a by vector b element-wise.
    dotProduct(double[], double[]) - Static method in class ie.atu.sw.VectorUtils
    Computes the dot product of two vectors.

    E

    EmbeddingLoader - Class in ie.atu.sw
    Loads word embeddings from a GloVe-format text file into an in-memory map.
    EmbeddingLoader() - Constructor for class ie.atu.sw.EmbeddingLoader
     
    euclideanDistance(double[], double[]) - Static method in class ie.atu.sw.VectorUtils
    Computes the Euclidean distance between two vectors.
    evaluate(String) - Method in class ie.atu.sw.WordAnalogy
    Parses and evaluates a word analogy expression, returning the result vector.

    F

    findTopN(double[], Map, int, String) - Method in class ie.atu.sw.SimilaritySearch
    Finds the topN words most similar to target using the specified similarity method.

    L

    load(String) - Method in class ie.atu.sw.EmbeddingLoader
    Reads the embeddings file into a Map<String, double[]>.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class ie.atu.sw.Runner
    Creates an ApplicationMenu and starts the interactive loop.
    multiply(double[], double[]) - Static method in class ie.atu.sw.VectorUtils
    Multiplies two vectors element-wise (Hadamard product).

    Writes word analogy results to a plain-text output file.

    Application entry point for the Word Analogies tool.

    S

    SimilaritySearch - Class in ie.atu.sw
    Searches a word embeddings map for the words whose vectors are most similar to a given target vector.
    SimilaritySearch() - Constructor for class ie.atu.sw.SimilaritySearch
     
    start() - Method in class ie.atu.sw.ApplicationMenu
    Starts the interactive menu loop.
    subtract(double[], double[]) - Static method in class ie.atu.sw.VectorUtils
    Subtracts vector b from vector a element-wise.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class ie.atu.sw.ConsoleColour
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class ie.atu.sw.ConsoleColour
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    VectorUtils - Class in ie.atu.sw
    Provides static utility methods for element-wise vector arithmetic and vector similarity metrics used in word embedding computations.
    VectorUtils() - Constructor for class ie.atu.sw.VectorUtils

    WordAnalogy - Class in ie.atu.sw
    Evaluates word analogy expressions against a loaded embeddings map.

    Constructs a WordAnalogy instance bound to the given embeddings map.
    write(List, String, String) - Method in class ie.atu.sw.ResultWriter
    Writes a ranked list of word-similarity results to the specified file.
